code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_at_unsafe(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut acc = "\t"
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = byte_at_unsafe(text, i)
  if is_ws(b)
    i = i + 1
  else
    mut j = i
    while j < n and not is_ws(byte_at_unsafe(text, j))
      j = j + 1
    end
    let token = string.substring(text, i, j)
    let candidate = "\t#{token}\t"
    if not string.contains(acc, candidate)
      count = count + 1
      acc = "#{acc}#{token}\t"
    end
    i = j
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
